pages.text: Bora is sitting at the clinic with Baba. Jojo, his stuffed monkey, came too. Jojo is sleeping in Bora’s bag.

blocks.text: Bora is sitting at the clinic with Baba.
Jojo, his stuffed monkey, came too.
Jojo is sleeping in Bora’s bag.

pages.text: “I don’t like needles. They hurt!” says Bora.

blocks.text: “I don’t like needles. They hurt!” says Bora.

pages.text: “An injection helps make you healthy. It’s okay to be scared, Bora. Baba will be right here with you. And Jojo too.”

blocks.text: “An injection helps make you healthy. It’s okay to be scared, Bora. Baba will be right here with you. And Jojo too.”

pages.text: “Bora Baraka!” a loud voice calls. “Let’s go Bora,” says Baba. “It’s your turn.” “Let’s come back tomorrow Baba!” says Bora.

blocks.text: “Bora Baraka!” a loud voice calls.
“Let’s go Bora,” says Baba.
“It’s your turn.”
“Let’s come back tomorrow Baba!” says Bora.

pages.text: “Remember what Baba said you will get for being brave enough to get your injection?” asks Baba. “A red lollipop! Okay, I’m coming,” says Bora.

blocks.text: “Remember what Baba said you will get for being brave enough to get your injection?” asks Baba.
“A red lollipop! Okay, I’m coming,” says Bora.

pages.text: The doctor smiles at Bora. “Is this your monkey? Can we examine him too?” she asks. Bora looks at Baba, then at Jojo, and nods.

blocks.text: The doctor smiles at Bora. “Is this your monkey? Can we examine him too?” she asks.
Bora looks at Baba, then at Jojo, and nods.

pages.text: “Now, it’s your turn,” she says. Will you help me give your monkey a small injection so he feels better?” asks the doctor.

blocks.text: “Now, it’s your turn,” she says.
Will you help me give your monkey a small injection so he feels better?” asks the doctor.

pages.text: “TOOP!” says the doctor as she gives Jojo the monkey an injection.

blocks.text: “TOOP!” says the doctor as she gives Jojo the monkey an injection.

pages.text: “Now, it’s your turn. Is that a superhero on your T-shirt?” she asks. “TOOP!” she says as she gives Bora the injection.

blocks.text: “Now, it’s your turn. Is that a superhero on your T-shirt?” she asks.
“TOOP!” she says as she gives Bora the injection.

pages.text: “Ouch!” shouts Bora. “Hey, that wasn’t so bad!”

blocks.text: “Ouch!” shouts Bora.
“Hey, that wasn’t so bad!”

pages.text: “I know it stings a little, but we’re done and you have been very brave!” says the doctor.

blocks.text: “I know it stings a little, but we’re done and you have been very brave!” says the doctor.

pages.text: “One red lollipop for our brave Bora!”

blocks.text: “One red lollipop for our brave Bora!”
